PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-29-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Rob Rosborough appeared via zoom for William Wu Zhang (petitioner).

Discussion was held regarding filing a substitution of attorney form, that the petition is premature and the court cannot confirm property to the surviving spouse, that the estate does not yet own. The matter is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Josh Fredricks. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
